svg.text: Policy-Based RBAC for Azure SQL Database — Deployment Flow
Verify az login, check Entra ID permissions
Needs Global Admin for Phase 4 (or skips)
Phase 1 creates groups via MS Graph API
Phase 4 grants Directory Readers to SQL MI
To SQL Server system MI | Needs Global Admin
Skipped if already granted or insufficient perms
SQL Server MI needs this role
Pre-flight: Verify az login + Entra ID permissions
Phase 1: Ensure Entra ID security groups (MS Graph API)
Phase 2: Deploy Azure resources (az stack sub create + polling)
Phase 3: Add UAMI to SqlDbAdmins group (idempotent)
Phase 4: Grant Directory Readers to SQL Server MI (conditional)
All phases are idempotent — safe to re-run
Phase 4 degrades gracefully without admin perms
